about.heroTitle: We're a remote web agency obsessed with
about.mission1: We build high-performance websites for local businesses across the US and Europe. No bloated templates. No page builders. Just clean, custom code that loads fast and looks great on every device.
about.mission2: We believe every local business — from dental clinics to barbershops to restaurants — deserves a website that actually brings in customers. Not just a digital business card, but a conversion machine.

fastDelivery.title: Fast Delivery
fastDelivery.description: Live preview in 48 hours. Full site in 5-7 days. We move fast without cutting corners.

resultsFocused.title: Results-Focused
resultsFocused.description: Every design decision is made to help your business get more customers online.

noBs.title: No BS
noBs.description: Transparent pricing. No contracts. You see the work before you pay a cent.

about.techDesc: Every site we build uses Nuxt, Vue, and Tailwind CSS — the same stack behind some of the fastest websites on the internet. No WordPress. No Wix. No compromises on performance.
about.ctaSubtitle: See what your new website could look like — free preview in 48 hours.

landing.name: Landing Page

faq.question: Do I pay before seeing anything?
faq.answer: No. We build a free live preview first. You only pay if you love it and want to go live.

faq.question: How do I pay?
faq.answer: Via Wise or PayPal. Simple international transfer — no complicated invoicing.

faq.question: Can I cancel Monthly Care?
faq.answer: Yes, anytime. No contracts, no cancellation fees. Your site stays yours.

faq.question: Do you redesign existing sites?
faq.answer: Yes. Same process, same pricing. We'll rebuild your site from scratch with modern tech and design.

faq.question: What tech do you use?
faq.answer: We build with Nuxt, Vue, and Tailwind CSS — modern, fast, and SEO-friendly. No WordPress, no page builders.

faq.question: Do you offer ongoing support?
faq.answer: Yes, through our Monthly Care plan ($29/mo). It includes hosting, SSL, updates, minor edits, and uptime monitoring.

seo.homeOgDescription: Custom-built, fast, mobile-first websites. Live preview in 48 hours. Starting at $500.

bright-smile-dental.challenge: Outdated website with slow load times, no mobile optimization, and zero online appointment bookings. Patients were calling or just going elsewhere.
bright-smile-dental.solution: Built a clean, modern 4-page site with online booking integration, mobile-first design, and optimized images. Focused on trust signals and clear calls to action.
results: Mobile-friendly design increased mobile traffic by 60%
Online booking form reduced phone call volume
Delivered in 5 days from first contact

oak-street-barbershop.challenge: No web presence at all — relying entirely on Instagram and word of mouth. Losing potential walk-in customers who search "barbershop near me."
oak-street-barbershop.solution: Created a single-page landing site with services, pricing, location map, and a clear "Book Now" button. Optimized for local SEO.
results: Appeared in local search results within 2 weeks
Clean design that matches their brand aesthetic

bella-cucina.challenge: Had a WordPress site from 2018 — slow, cluttered, and the menu was a blurry PDF. Customers couldn't find hours or location easily.
bella-cucina.solution: Designed a 3-page site with a beautiful digital menu, reservation link, and prominent hours/location. Photography-forward layout with warm tones.
results: Digital menu replaced PDF — accessible on all devices
